title: doc-driven-dev manifest (.docmeta.json)
description: Single source of truth for a repo's docs/ tree: contract version, project profile, which core sections and optional modules are enabled, site config, and validator settings. Lives at docs/.docmeta.json and is committed.

contractVersion.description: Frontmatter/link contract version this docs tree targets (semver). The validator uses it to stay backward-compatible.

pluginVersion.description: doc-driven-dev version that scaffolded or last touched this tree.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) the docs tree was scaffolded.

repoUrl.description: Repository URL; used by the Docusaurus editUrl. May be empty.

defaultAuthor.description: Default frontmatter author for new docs.

packages.description: Workspace package roots when monorepo is true.

modules.description: Optional domain modules keyed by canonical numbered folder name (e.g. 04-frontend).

reason.description: Why detection enabled it (e.g. 'react in package.json').

paths.description: Code paths this module owns; used by docs-sync to map code changes to docs.

path.description: Path (relative to repo root) where check-docs.mjs was installed.

skipDirs.description: Folder names (relative to docs/) excluded from validation.

glossaryPath.description: Path to the glossary file relative to docs/.
